candidates.why: Explicit total revenue/top-line row; matches Net sales values and is the best candidate-list match for revenue.
Not revenue; direct cost line, so not appropriate for REVT.
COGS line, not revenue.
Operating expense, not revenue.
Impairment expense, not revenue.
Depreciation expense, not revenue.

candidates.row_label: Sales and marketing expenses exl Dep/Amortization
candidates.why: Operating expense, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit total revenue row from the candidate list.

candidates.why: Direct production/service cost line, but appears duplicated and one instance is only partially populated.
Explicit COGS line with consistent populated values across years; strongest direct-cost label.

variables.notes: Using a priority list because labels appear to vary/duplicate over time. 'Cost of revenues/COGS' is preferred due to more consistent population and exact concept match.

candidates.why: Clear SG&A component above EBIT; selling/marketing overhead.
Clear SG&A component above EBIT; administrative overhead.
Dedicated R&D operating expense above EBIT; per rule include in XSGA_COMPONENTS when separately reported so XSGA-XRD removes it.
Could be overhead-related, but likely overlaps with sales/admin/R&D components and would risk double counting.
Balance sheet asset line, not income statement SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No single explicit SG&A total row exists. Selected component overhead rows above EBIT. Included 'Research and development expenses' in XSGA_COMPONENTS as separately reported operating expense so that XSGA_COMPONENTS - XRD excludes R&D as intended.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense above EBIT; best XRD mapping.
Only the D&A subcomponent of R&D, not the preferred total R&D expense.
Impairment subcomponent, not the main recurring R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research and development expenses exl. Dep/Amortization
candidates.why: Alternative R&D measure excluding D&A; less preferable than the main R&D expense line.
Impairment-only line, not the main R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset line, not period R&D expense.
Balance sheet accumulated amortization/impairment, not R&D expense.

final_choice.row_label: Research and development expenses exl. Dep/Amortization

variables.notes: Selected dedicated R&D expense lines above EBIT as a priority list. The first choice is the full reported R&D expense; the second is a fallback label that may apply in some periods.

candidates.why: Populated finance-cost line; broader than pure interest but acceptable when no reliable pure interest-expense line is available.
Semantically ideal, but appears duplicated and unpopulated in the preview, making it less reliable for this mapping.
Too broad/other finance costs, not clearly interest.
Interest-related but partial/subcomponent, not necessarily total interest expense.
Semantically good but unpopulated in preview; may not be the consistently reported line.
Lease-interest subcomponent only, not total interest expense.
Lease-interest subcomponent only, not total interest expense.
Broad other finance costs, not clearly interest.
Broad other finance cost label, not clearly interest.
Duplicate-format finance-cost label, but unpopulated in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental lease-interest disclosure only, not total interest expense.

variables.notes: No clearly reliable standalone total interest-expense row is populated in the preview. Per rule, used the broader 'Financial expenses' line as primary fallback, with 'Other Interest Expenses' as a secondary interest-related label.

candidates.why: Income statement non-equity-account line; not book equity.

Not shareholders' equity.
Asset investment line, not shareholders' equity.
Component of equity, but not total book equity.
Explicit total equity line on the balance sheet; best available BE measure.

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line is not available on the balance sheet. 'Total shareholders equity' is the best book equity proxy, and non-controlling interests appear to be zero/absent, so this is acceptable.

candidates.why: Income statement attribution line, not preferred balance sheet minority interest.
Income statement attribution line, not preferred balance sheet minority interest.
Correct balance sheet NCI line, but values are blank/zero and BE uses total equity; better to set MIB to empty to avoid any chance of double counting.
Correct concept but also blank/zero; same double-counting concern when BE uses total equity.

variables.notes: Set to empty because BE is mapped to 'Total shareholders equity'. Under the equity rule, MIB should be [] in this case to avoid double counting, especially since the NCI lines appear zero/blank.
